title: Operationalize orchestrator runtime-discipline benchmark and bypass detection
description: Turn the orchestrator runtime-discipline benchmark into runnable AOF work by defining minimum orchestration artifact chains, adding benchmark cases for prose-only and partial-runtime coordination, and treating runtime bypass as a blocking benchmark failure.
triage_notes: Baseline runtime-discipline operationalization is complete: prose-only and partial-runtime negative cases exist, the one-command runner replays the latest positive path, and machine-readable audit note, packet, and reconstruction map are generated. Remaining work moves to a follow-up task for broader audit automation and lower-cost audit paths before v3.1.0.
